description_long: This is a modern, medium-sized sofa upholstered in a warm brown fabric with a distinctive grid-tufted pattern on both the seat and backrest. The sofa features two broad, rectangular seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all of which are attached and uniformly sized. The armrests are straight, padded, and extend to the same height as the backrest, with a subtle dark accent strip along the top edge. The back of the sofa is fully upholstered and includes a visible underframe, suggesting a possible pull-out or storage function. The legs are small, dark, and minimally visible, positioned at the corners and slightly recessed for a floating appearance. This sofa would be well-suited for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or residential living rooms.
description: A modern brown sofa with grid-tufted seat and back cushions, straight padded armrests, and a subtle dark accent. The design is clean and contemporary, with attached cushions and a sturdy, upholstered frame.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the sofa, highlighting the grid-tufted seat and back cushions, and the straight padded armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the armrest's height relative to the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the fully upholstered back and a visible underframe, possibly indicating a storage or pull-out feature.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest profile and the uniformity of the seat and back cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached seat cushions and two matching attached back cushions, all with uniform size and grid-tufted arrangement.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests at seat height, with a rectangular profile and a dark accent strip along the top edge.
attribute_leg_design: Small, dark, minimally visible legs positioned at the corners and slightly recessed, likely made of wood or metal.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with attached, grid-tufted cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Grid-tufted upholstery with a uniform, quilted texture and no visible decorative stitching beyond the tufting.
